feat.name: Aldori Riposte
feat.requirement: You are using an Aldori dueling sword to parry.
feat.text: You riposte with your Aldori dueling sword when your enemy leaves an opening. Make a melee Strike against or attempt to Disarm the triggering opponent using your Aldori dueling sword.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: An opponent within your reach critically fails a Strike against you.
